name: live_success
description: SLES 15-SP3 host, current repos present, all replacements probe live. repose emits rr aliases and ar commands in nondeterministic set-iteration order; Rust applies the stable-sort delta, so aliases sort ascending and full ar strings sort (params-first: -cfkn update before -ckn pool). Order is zypper-irrelevant.

name: dry_success
description: Dry-run of live_success: same lines previewed, nothing executed.

name: empty_aliases_skip_rr
description: No current repos: skip rr (never a bare `zypper -n rr`), still add replacements.

name: abort_no_live
description: All replacement URLs dead: empty-cmds guard aborts before any rr/ar or dry preview.

name: abort_partial_drop
description: One replacement URL (pool) dead: dropped guard aborts before any rr/ar. Safety-critical.

name: abort_partial_drop_dry
description: Dry-run partial drop: guards run before the dry preview, so no dry lines are emitted either.
